languages.text: "Также, судя по исследованиям, текущее поведение Погонщиц никак не связано с истончением завесы с имматериумом. Таинственный сигнал раздражает их нервную систему, приводя в ярость — это некий способ управлять ими. В теории, он способен на большее, чем просто приводить их в неистовство, но пока что Адептус Механикус не в силах постичь его тайны. Техножрецы предполагают, что сработала своего рода планетарная система безопасности, что ввела в неистовство местную биосферу".

"Based on the research, it also appears that the present behaviour of the Drovers has nothing to do with the thinning of the veil between realspace and the Immaterium. The mysterious signal irritates their nervous system, driving them into a rage — it is a means of controlling them. In theory, it is capable of more than just sending them into a frenzy, but so far the Adeptus Mechanicus is unable to uncover its secrets. The Tech-Priests suppose that some sort of planetary security system was triggered, which riled up the local biosphere."

В теории, он способен на большее, чем просто приводить их в неистовство, но пока что Адептус Механикус не в силах постичь его тайны. languages.text: 「調査の結果、ドルーバーの行動は、現実空間とイマテリアムの境界が薄れていることとは関係がないようです。謎の信号は彼らの神経系を刺激し、怒り狂わせる手段です。理論上は、怒り狂わせるだけでなく、もっと強力な効果も可能ですが、今のところアデプタ・メカニックはその秘密を解明できていません。テクプリストたちは、惑星のセキュリティシステムが起動し、それが地元の生物圏を刺激したと推測しています」
languages.original_text: "Based on the research, it also appears that the present behaviour of the Drovers has nothing to do with the thinning of the veil between realspace and the Immaterium. The mysterious signal irritates their nervous system, driving them into a rage — it is a means of controlling them. In theory, it is capable of more than just sending them into a frenzy, but so far the Adeptus Mechanicus is unable to uncover its secrets. The Tech-Priests suppose that some sort of planetary security system was triggered, which riled up the local biosphere."

traits.locale_text: 「調査の結果、ドルーバーの行動は、現実空間とイマテリアムの境界が薄れていることとは関係がないようです。謎の信号は彼らの神経系を刺激し、怒り狂わせる手段です。理論上は、怒り狂わせるだけでなく、もっと強力な効果も可能ですが、今のところアデプタ・メカニックはその秘密を解明できていません。テクプリストたちは、惑星のセキュリティシステムが起動し、それが地元の生物圏を刺激したと推測しています。」

languages.text: «Además, basándome en nuestra investigación, parece que el comportamiento actual de los Pastores no tiene nada que ver con el desgaste del velo entre el espacio real y el Inmaterio. La señal misteriosa irrita su sistema nervioso y los enfurece. Sirve para controlarlos. En teoría, podría tener efectos más allá de la rabia, pero por el momento el Adeptus Mechanicus no ha logrado descubrir sus secretos. Los tecnosacerdotes creen que algo activó un sistema de seguridad planetario, perturbando la biosfera local».
languages.original_text: "Based on the research, it also appears that the present behaviour of the Drovers has nothing to do with the thinning of the veil between realspace and the Immaterium. The mysterious signal irritates their nervous system, driving them into a rage — it is a means of controlling them. In theory, it is capable of more than just sending them into a frenzy, but so far the Adeptus Mechanicus is unable to uncover its secrets. The Tech-Priests suppose that some sort of planetary security system was triggered, which riled up the local biosphere."

traits.locale_text: «Además, basándome en nuestra investigación, parece que el comportamiento actual de los Pastores no tiene nada que ver con el desgaste del velo entre el espacio real y el Inmaterio. La señal misteriosa irrita su sistema nervioso y los enfurece. Sirve para controlarlos. En teoría, podría tener efectos más allá de la rabia, pero por el momento el Adeptus Mechanicus no ha logrado descubrir sus secretos. Los tecnosacerdotes creen que algo activó un sistema de seguridad planetario, perturbando la biosfera local».

languages.text: “研究还表明，拒生花当前的异常行为，与真实世界和亚空间之间障壁变薄无关。是某种神秘信号对拒生花的神经系统产生了刺激，诱发了狂暴——这是一种控制手段。理论上，该信号能做的远不止驱使其发狂，但目前机械修会尚未破解其中奥秘。技术神甫们推测，有某种行星保护系统被激活，进而激怒了当地生物圈。”
languages.original_text: "Based on the research, it also appears that the present behaviour of the Drovers has nothing to do with the thinning of the veil between realspace and the Immaterium. The mysterious signal irritates their nervous system, driving them into a rage — it is a means of controlling them. In theory, it is capable of more than just sending them into a frenzy, but so far the Adeptus Mechanicus is unable to uncover its secrets. The Tech-Priests suppose that some sort of planetary security system was triggered, which riled up the local biosphere."

traits.locale_text: “研究还表明，拒生花当前的异常行为，与真实世界和亚空间之间障壁变薄无关。是某种神秘信号对拒生花的神经系统产生了刺激，诱发了狂暴——这是一种控制手段。理论上，该信号能做的远不止驱使其发狂，但目前机械修会尚未破解其中奥秘。技术神甫们推测，有某种行星保护系统被激活，进而激怒了当地生物圈。”

languages.text: "Basierend auf ihrer Forschung hat das derzeitige Verhalten der Treiber nichts mit der Auflösung des Schleiers zwischen dem Realraum und dem Immaterium zu tun. Das geheimnisvolle Signal stört ihr Nervensystem und versetzt sie in Wut ... es ist ein Mittel, sie zu kontrollieren. Theoretisch kann es weit mehr, als sie zur Raserei zu bringen, aber bis jetzt konnte das Adeptus Mechanicus seine Geheimnisse noch nicht lüften. Die Techpriester vermuten, dass irgendein planetarisches Sicherheitssystem ausgelöst wurde, das die örtliche Biosphäre erzürnt hat."
languages.original_text: "Based on the research, it also appears that the present behaviour of the Drovers has nothing to do with the thinning of the veil between realspace and the Immaterium. The mysterious signal irritates their nervous system, driving them into a rage — it is a means of controlling them. In theory, it is capable of more than just sending them into a frenzy, but so far the Adeptus Mechanicus is unable to uncover its secrets. The Tech-Priests suppose that some sort of planetary security system was triggered, which riled up the local biosphere."

traits.locale_text: "Basierend auf ihrer Forschung hat das derzeitige Verhalten der Treiber nichts mit der Auflösung des Schleiers zwischen dem Realraum und dem Immaterium zu tun. Das geheimnisvolle Signal stört ihr Nervensystem und versetzt sie in Wut ... es ist ein Mittel, sie zu kontrollieren. Theoretisch kann es weit mehr, als sie zur Raserei zu bringen, aber bis jetzt konnte das Adeptus Mechanicus seine Geheimnisse noch nicht lüften. Die Techpriester vermuten, dass irgendein planetarisches Sicherheitssystem ausgelöst wurde, das die örtliche Biosphäre erzürnt hat."

languages.text: "Araştırmaya dayanarak Çobanların şu anki davranışlarının gerçekuzay ile Tindiyar arasındaki örtünün incelmesiyle hiçbir ilgisi olmadığı da görülüyor. Gizemli sinyal, sinir sistemlerini tahriş ederek onları öfkelendiriyor. Bu, onları kontrol etmenin bir yolu. Teoride onları sadece çılgına çevirmekten daha fazlasını yapabilir ancak Adeptus Mechanicus, şu ana dek sırlarını çözemedi. Tekno Rahipler, yerel biyosferi kışkırtan bir tür gezegensel güvenlik sisteminin tetiklendiğini varsayıyor."
languages.original_text: "Based on the research, it also appears that the present behaviour of the Drovers has nothing to do with the thinning of the veil between realspace and the Immaterium. The mysterious signal irritates their nervous system, driving them into a rage — it is a means of controlling them. In theory, it is capable of more than just sending them into a frenzy, but so far the Adeptus Mechanicus is unable to uncover its secrets. The Tech-Priests suppose that some sort of planetary security system was triggered, which riled up the local biosphere."

traits.locale_text: "Araştırmaya dayanarak Çobanların şu anki davranışlarının gerçekuzay ile Tindiyar arasındaki örtünün incelmesiyle hiçbir ilgisi olmadığı da görülüyor. Gizemli sinyal, sinir sistemlerini tahriş ederek onları öfkelendiriyor. Bu, onları kontrol etmenin bir yolu. Teoride onları sadece çılgına çevirmekten daha fazlasını yapabilir ancak Adeptus Mechanicus, şu ana dek sırlarını çözemedi. Tekno Rahipler, yerel biyosferi kışkırtan bir tür gezegensel güvenlik sisteminin tetiklendiğini varsayıyor."

languages.text: « Ses recherches suggèrent également que le comportement actuel des Chasseurs n'est pas lié à l'affaiblissement du voile entre l'espace réel et l'Immaterium. Le mystérieux signal irrite leur système nerveux, ce qui les enrage... et c'est aussi un moyen de les contrôler. En théorie, ce signal peut faire bien plus que les rendre fous, mais pour l'instant, l'Adeptus Mechanicus n'est pas parvenu à en percer les secrets. Les technoprêtres supposent qu'une sorte de système de sécurité planétaire s'est déclenché, ce qui aurait perturbé la biosphère locale. »
languages.original_text: "Based on the research, it also appears that the present behaviour of the Drovers has nothing to do with the thinning of the veil between realspace and the Immaterium. The mysterious signal irritates their nervous system, driving them into a rage — it is a means of controlling them. In theory, it is capable of more than just sending them into a frenzy, but so far the Adeptus Mechanicus is unable to uncover its secrets. The Tech-Priests suppose that some sort of planetary security system was triggered, which riled up the local biosphere."
